items.title: Overzicht: belangrijkste winterdeals op buitenlandse Deadline Day
items.summary: De transfermarkt gaat maandagavond dicht in de grote Europese competities. In dit overzicht houdt VI de belangrijkste wintertransfers op de buitenlandse Deadline Day bij.

items.title: Deadline Day: Disasi van Chelsea naar West Ham, Atleti presenteert derde aanwinst
items.summary: Maandagavond sluit de transfermarkt in de buitenlandse topcompetities. Traditiegetrouw volgt Voetbal International Deadline Day op de voet. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland. In dit artikel lees je hoe laat de markt sluit in de diverse competities.

items.title: 'Pure genius' - who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
items.summary: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

items.title: Your Premier League club's January window assessed
PSV laat Van Duiven seizoen afmaken bij Lommel
items.summary: Robin van Duiven (19) maakt het seizoen af bij Lommel SK. Ondanks de tijdsdruk is het alle partijen gelukt om de huurtransfer van de spits van Jong PSV af te ronden.

items.title: Wintertransfers Eredivisie seizoen 2025/26: alle clubs op een rij
items.summary: De transferperiode is weer losgebarsten. In dit overzicht van VI vind je alle afgeronde, door clubs bevestigde, wintertransfers van de achttien Eredivisie-clubs. Clubs in Nederland kunnen tot en met 3 februari spelers aantrekken .

items.title: Transfer deadline day: Crystal Palace sign Strand Larsen and Liverpool confirm Jacquet deal – live
items.summary: ⚽ Transfer interactive: deals from Europe’s top five leagues ⚽ 7pm GMT deadline | Follow us on Bluesky | Email Alex The centre-forward to whose leaving I refer is Jean-Philippe Mateta. You can’t argue with numbers, I don’t suppose, and he’s done a fairly good job in patches, I just can’t get on board with a striker so bad at finishing one-on-ones. If Milan are seriously prepared to give £30m for a 28-year-old, I’d say thank you very much. In an effort to save themselves – an effort that ought, perhaps, to have been made in the summer, strengthening a team doing brilliantly to give it a chance of performing both domestically and in Europe – they’ve taken Evann Guessand on loan from Villa. I can’t say I like what I’ve seen so far, but perhaps Oliver Glasner’s system suits him more than Unai Emery’s. Continue reading...

items.title: Transfer window winners and losers: How Man City, Liverpool, PSG, others fared
items.summary: This winter transfer window had its share of perplexing player moves. Here are our winners and losers.

items.title: Transfer deadline day as it happened: Benzema to Al Hilal and more
items.summary: Catch up on everything from around Europe as teams made some deals before the deadline.

items.title: Rangers lijkt met nieuwe spits weg vrij te maken voor NEC-target Danilo
items.summary: De winterse transfermarkt is geopend. In dit blog vind je alle speculaties en bevestigde transfers in Nederland. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in het buitenland.

items.title: Benzema joins Al Hilal as Kante heads to Fener
items.summary: Karim Benzema has left Al Ittihad and signed a contract with Saudi Pro League rivals Al Hilal, the club announced Monday.

items.title: Liverpool seal $74M deal for Jacquet from Rennes
items.summary: Liverpool have confirmed the signing of defender Jérémy Jacquet from Rennes who is set to join the club in the summer.

items.title: Sources: Ronaldo dispute with PIF behind absence
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo will miss Al Nassr's Saudi Pro League match with Al Riyadh as he is unhappy with PIF's (Saudi Arabian Public Investment Fund) lack of transfer activity at the club compared to other clubs owned by the fund.

items.title: 'Strong and smart' - have Liverpool signed 'next Van Dijk' in Jacquet?
items.summary: Jeremy Jacquet will join Liverpool for £60m from Rennes in the summer - but why are the Reds signing him?

items.title: Arteta calls Arsenal ‘most exciting team in Europe’ after Scholes’ criticism
items.summary: ‘We have the most goals, the most clean sheets’ Liam Rosenior predicts ‘physical’ Carabao Cup second leg Mikel Arteta has laughed off a suggestion from Paul Scholes that Arsenal would be the most boring team to win the Premier League, insisting his side are considered “the most exciting in Europe” in other countries. Scholes, the former Manchester United midfielder, pointed to the lack of goals from Arsenal’s front four this season and reliance on set pieces as evidence for his claim. Viktor Gyökeres is the club’s top scorer in the league with six, and Arsenal have scored 17 goals from set pieces – three more than any other club. Continue reading...

items.title: Talbi rocket seals decisive Sunderland win over Burnley
items.summary: Watch highlights as Sunderland earn a decisive victory over struggling Burnley, capped by an incredible long-range goal from Chemsdine Talbi.

items.title: Romero hits out at Spurs’ ‘disgraceful’ squad shortage on social media post
items.summary: Captain made jibe after Manchester City comeback ‘We had 11 players available – unbelievable but true’ Cristian Romero has said it is “disgraceful” that Tottenham are operating with such a threadbare squad in an apparent dig at the club’s January recruitment strategy. The club captain is no stranger to outspoken social media posts and he dropped another one on Monday evening shortly after the closure of the mid-season transfer window. Continue reading...

items.title: Two club-record signings - but are Palace papering over the cracks?
items.summary: Crystal Palace end a horrendous January with a rollercoaster day - but are they just papering over the cracks?

items.title: Talbi’s stunning strike seals emphatic Sunderland win over struggling Burnley
items.summary: Habib Diarra and Chemsdine Talbi sat behind opposing dugouts during last month’s acrimonious Africa Cup of Nations final as Senegal beat Morocco in Rabat. While suspension deprived Diarra of his starting place for the victors, Morocco’s Talbi was an unused substitute but, on a freezing Wearside night, they were reunited as Sunderland teammates and duly revelled in taking their frustrations out on Burnley. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Disgraceful Spurs had 11 fit players' - captain Romero
items.summary: Captain Cristian Romero says it is "disgraceful" Tottenham had just 11 senior players available for Sunday's 2-2 Premier League draw at home to Manchester City.
